markets.description:

markets.question: Spurs vs. Trail Blazers
markets.eventTitle: Spurs vs. Trail Blazers
markets.description:
In the upcoming NBA game, scheduled for April 24 at 10:30PM ET:
If the Spurs win, the market will resolve to "Spurs".
If the Trail Blazers win, the market will resolve to "Trail Blazers".
